decisions.briefing: Markets edged higher in a neutral session with NASDAQ up 0.4% and S&P 500 up 0.3%. All three holdings — META, COIN, and MSTR — maintain top-tier momentum scores of 95 with RSI in the bullish zone and MACD bullish crossovers intact. Already at the 3-position limit with no compelling reason to rotate, holding all positions to let momentum run toward profit targets.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted modest gains in a directionless session, with the NASDAQ rising 0.4% and the S&P 500 adding 0.3%, reflecting cautious optimism amid steady macro conditions. Technology and crypto-adjacent names continued to attract buyers as momentum indicators remained constructive across growth sectors. With no major catalysts to disrupt the trend, markets drifted higher on light conviction.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日小幅收高，走勢偏中性，納指漲0.4%，標普500指數漲0.3%，反映市場在宏觀環境相對穩定下保持謹慎樂觀情緒。科技股及加密貨幣相關個股持續獲資金青睞，各成長板塊動能指標維持強勢。市場缺乏重大催化劑，成交量清淡，股價於高位緩步上揚。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that bets on stocks already moving higher to keep rising. The idea is that assets showing strong recent performance — measured by indicators like RSI and MACD — tend to continue in the same direction in the short term. Today all three holdings score 95 on momentum, which is why we're holding rather than selling into strength.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指追買近期表現強勁的股票，押注其漲勢得以延續。其背後邏輯在於：透過RSI、MACD等技術指標顯示強勁動能的資產，短期內往往傾向維持同一方向運行。今日組合中三檔持倉的動能評分均達95分，正是我們選擇持倉不動、讓趨勢繼續發展的原因。
